S

setAction(String) - Method in class textadventure.logic.Command
Sets the action for the command.
setDescription(String) - Method in class textadventure.entities.Item
Sets the description of the item.
setExits(String, Room) - Method in class textadventure.entities.Room
Sets an exit from this room to another room in the specified direction.
setName(String) - Method in class textadventure.entities.Item
Sets the name of the item.
setTarget(String) - Method in class textadventure.logic.Command
Sets the target for the command.
showInventory() - Method in class textadventure.logic.Inventory
Displays the current contents of the player's inventory.
start() - Method in class textadventure.game.Game
Starts the game by initializing the game loop and processing player input.
